claims.summary: A marker followed by the phrase behaves like should be preserved as an explicit relation.
claims.disposition: Added the exact behaves-like case to the poetic-attribution regression table; current matcher behavior passes.

claims.summary: Five-level delimiter nesting should remain safe and make the four-level evidence bound explicit.
claims.disposition: Added a regression proving the token remains byte-exact while token and context receipts cap proven depth at four.

claims.summary: Scanner offset progression must neither loop nor skip bytes around high-entropy multibyte text.
claims.disposition: Added a UTF-8 regression proving one marker removal and byte-exact preservation of all surrounding multibyte content.

claims.summary: Context receipts should identify marker handling without copying surrounding prose.
claims.disposition: Verified existing bounded hashes, omission counters, delimiter evidence, and no-prose serialization tests.
